name: MediTrack
description: A healthcare application for managing patient records with automated cloud deployments.
bullets: Developed a healthcare application for managing patient records, appointments, and medical history.
Integrated AI-based health recommendations using patient data and predefined health parameters.
Implemented secure authentication and role-based access control for patients and healthcare providers.
Automated deployment and server configuration using Ansible and cloud infrastructure to ensure 99.9% uptime.

name: NeuroBiz
description: An AI-powered business automation platform for workflow management.
bullets: Developed an AI-powered business automation platform using React, TypeScript, Vite, and Python services.
Built responsive dashboards, workflow automation modules, and real-time chat interfaces using WebSocket communication.
Integrated REST APIs and optimized application performance through efficient state management and modular design.
Implemented secure authentication, role-based access control, and analytics dashboards for business insights.

name: RelationOS
description: An AI-powered relationship companion and couple application with business partner dashboard.
bullets: Architected and built RelationOS, an AI-powered mobile application designed to strengthen couples' communication and simplify planning.
Designed and integrated an AI Intelligence Layer that builds evolving personality profiles to deliver personalized event recommendations.
Developed backend services using Node.js and Python with secure authentication, partner pairing, and real-time syncing.
Built a business partner dashboard enabling local merchants to manage promotions, offers, and couple-focused events.

name: Sanz Cafe
description: A responsive website built for a business client.
bullets: Developed and deployed a responsive website for a local business client, increasing their online presence.
Optimized user experience and responsiveness across mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
Collaborated directly with the client to gather requirements, deliver features, and handle domain/hosting setup.
